gameTitle: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

achievements.title: Happy Birthday, Harry!
achievements.description: Restrain Hagrid's birthday present.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: A Little Pick-Me-Up
achievements.description: Find some Rat Tonic in the Leaky Cauldron's cellar.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Clever Crookshanks
achievements.description: Accompany Hermione into the cellar, retrieve her new cat, and then meet up with Ron.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Poor Scabbers
achievements.description: Accompany Ron into the cellar, retrieve his pet rat, and then meet up with Hermione.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Always Listen to Teachers
achievements.description: As Hermione, follow Professor Lupin's instructions and then return to the Baggage Car.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: A Quest for Chocolate
achievements.description: As Ron, acquire some chocolate from the Buffet Car and then return to Harry.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Castle Secrets
achievements.description: Discover your first secret passageway while exploring Hogwarts Castle.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Trespassing
achievements.description: Break into the Hogwarts Boathouse and find a Romanian Longhorn Dragon-hide Cloak.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Catch the Animagus
achievements.description: Finish Transfiguration class and receive a reward from Professor McGonagall.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Hagrid's First Lesson
achievements.description: Find 5 extra textbooks in the garden, and deliver them to Hagrid.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Helping Harry
achievements.description: Help Harry to find all 5 ingredients during Potions class.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Opposites Attract
achievements.description: Help Ron to find all 5 ingredients during Potions class.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Bibliophile
achievements.description: Retrieve the 5 missing pages in the library and reattach them to the book on werewolves.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Practice Makes Perfect
achievements.description: Cast 500 successful patronuses in one round of ''The Dementors are surrounding Harry!'' inside Lupin's office.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Saving Ron
achievements.description: Incapacitate the Whomping Willow so you can pursue Ron.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Choosing Left
achievements.description: As Harry, manage to reunite with Hermione after splitting up underneath the Whomping Willow.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Choosing Right
achievements.description: As Hermione, manage to reunite with Harry after splitting up underneath the Whomping Willow.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Traitor
achievements.description: Uncover the truth.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Clearing the Path
achievements.description: Defeat the Forest Troll blocking the exit to the castle grounds.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Expecto Patronum!
achievements.description: Score at least 35,000 in ''The Dementors are surrounding Harry!'' while trying to save everyone.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Battle of the Beasts
achievements.description: Defeat the werewolf.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Rooftop Inferno
achievements.description: As Harry, cross through the fiery jets, and reunite with Hermione on the other side.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Skating Through Danger
achievements.description: As Hermione, traverse the flooded roof, and reunite with Harry on the other side.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Final Obstacle
achievements.description: Defeat the last person standing in the way of you rescuing your newfound family.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: London's Pest Problem
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts in the Leaky Cauldron and on the Hogwarts Express.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Exploring the First Floor
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts in the Transfiguration classroom and maze.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Exploring the Dungeons
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts in the Potions classroom and maze. (Choose Ron to see Giant Spider)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Learning Defense Against the Dark Arts
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts in the Hogwarts staff room and DADA classroom.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Exploring the Library
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts in the Hogwarts library.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Exploring the Great Outdoors
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts on the Hogwarts grounds. (includes Hagrid's Garden and Path to Hagrid's)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Exploring High and Low
achievements.description: Use Informous to gather information on all beasts on the Shrieking Shack path and Hogwarts rooftop.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: A Hungering for Hostility
achievements.description: Collect all Jinx cards listed in the Folio Universitas.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Passionate About Protection
achievements.description: Collect all Defense_Protection cards listed in the Folio Universitas.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Diverse Desires
achievements.description: Collect all General cards listed in the Folio Universitas.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: A Love of Learning
achievements.description: Collect all Hogwarts/Instruction cards listed in the Folio Universitas.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Coveting Quidditch
achievements.description: Collect all Quidditch cards listed in the Folio Universitas.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Whirlwind
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Flipendo Duo. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Terrifying Twister
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Flipendo Tria. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Lightning Strike
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Verdimillious Duo. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Static Storm
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Verdimillious Tria. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Combustion
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Incendio Duo. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Blazing Barrage
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Incendio Tria. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Cursing Everything in Sight
achievements.description: Harry, Ron, or Hermione learns Petrificus Totalus Duo. (Not from Ultimate MP Combo)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Overachiever
achievements.description: Hermione learns all possible spells the hard way. (Flipendo x3, V. x3, Incendio x3, Fumos x2, P.T. x2, Glacius x2, and W.L.)
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Starting Divination
achievements.description: Equip a Crystal Ball.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Harry the Seeker
achievements.description: Equip Harry with Quidditch Gloves, Quidditch Boots, a Quidditch Helmet, a Quidditch Robe, and a Golden Snitch.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: A Taste of Luxury
achievements.description: Equip Ron with a cap, a cloak, a belt, gloves, and boots that are all made from Hungarian Horntail Dragon-hide.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Kaboom!
achievements.description: Earn more than 1000 points with a single pop in ''Wizard Cracker Pop-it'' on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: No Cracker Unpopped
achievements.description: Clear an entire screen in ''Wizard Cracker Pop-it'' on any difficulty.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Nighttime Circuit
achievements.description: Make it through each of the 9 different rings of bats in ''Buckbeak's Hippogriff Glide'' on Hard.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Equestrian
achievements.description: Score 14 points in ''Buckbeak's Hippogriff Glide'' on Easy.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: The Giggles
achievements.description: Earn a score of at least 2,100 in ''Riddikulus Boggart Challenge'' on Hard.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Hysterical
achievements.description: Successfully cast 70 spells in one game of ''Riddikulus Boggart Challenge'' on Easy.
achievements.author: Prism

achievements.title: Tasseomancer
achievements.description: Play ''Tea Leaf Divination''.
achievements.author: Prism
